title: TechNova Shipping Policy
content:
## TechNova Shipping Policy

**Free Standard Shipping** on all orders over $50 (before tax).

### Shipping Methods & Estimated Delivery Times:

| Method | Cost | Delivery Time | Availability |
|--------|------|---------------|-------------|
| Standard | Free (orders $50+) / $5.99 | 5-7 business days | US, Canada, UK, EU, Australia |
| Express | $14.99 | 2-3 business days | US, Canada, UK, EU, Australia |
| Overnight | $29.99 | Next business day | US only (excludes AK, HI) |

### Important Notes:
- Orders placed before 2:00 PM EST on business days are processed the same day.
- PO Boxes are supported for Standard shipping only.
- Express and Overnight are NOT available for PO Box addresses.
- Shipping to APO/FPO addresses uses Standard shipping timelines.
- International orders may be subject to customs duties and import taxes, which are the customer's responsibility.
- Tracking information is emailed within 24 hours of shipment.
- During peak seasons (Black Friday, holidays), delivery times may be extended by 1-2 business days.

### Countries We Ship To:
United States, Canada, United Kingdom, Germany, France, Netherlands, Belgium, Spain, Italy, Australia, New Zealand, Japan, South Korea, Singapore.

### Cannot Ship:
- Lithium battery products (speakers, laptops) cannot be shipped via Overnight to non-US addresses due to air freight regulations.
